creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
For the record, having the kernel source tree loaded, and a full
buildworld/buildkernel/installworld/installkernel cycle run

will generally fix most lsof build issues, and is the first thing I will ask
a problem reporter to do.

 

Thanks cy for looking at it and contacting me. 

 

 

Thanks,

Larry Rosenman

sysutils/lsof  maintainer

 

-- 

Larry Rosenman                     http://www.lerctr.org/~ler
